info.english_meaning: to give birth to become pregnant to conceive to possess power to possess supremacy
info.hindI_arTa: utpanna karanA pEdA karanA garBa DAraRa karanA adButa sAmarTya honA amAnavI parAkrama honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: prasavoByanujYAnam  Adye sakarmakaH  dvitIye tu akarmakaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: utpanna karanA prasUta honA jananA garBa DAraRa karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'gOriva prasavatyarTAn rasamuttamaSAlinI (BA॰aSva॰21.22) prasavati=sUte=utpAdayati prasava iha utpAda ukto nAByanujYAnam
'tatremaM yajYaM yajamAnaM ca Dehyo praRayeti prasOti' (Apa॰SrO॰3.6.19.1) aByanujAnAtItyarTaH
'devAnAM parizUtamasIti darBAn parizOti' (Apa0 SrO0 1236) parizavaRaM savanAya parigraha iti DUrtasvAmI
